memory.summary: I see a chance to relax, but with the term project due Thursday and barely started, I need to prioritize that over leisure right now.

desires: Secure a dedicated, uninterrupted block of time with my core team (cohort_3) to align on the term project strategy before we commit to execution, ensuring our shared effort yields a high-quality result.
Protect my physical recovery tonight by enforcing strict sleep discipline despite the looming deadline, refusing to sacrifice tomorrow's focus for today's rushed progress.
Avoid the friction of being perceived as unreliable or disorganized by my teammates, which would damage the trust and closeness I value most in our relationship.

goals.description: Initiate a direct, face-to-face (or synchronous text) strategy session with cohort_3 immediately to align on the term project roadmap before any individual work begins.
goals.rationale: My core value is relationships (0.5). I must assertively secure our alignment now to prevent future friction and ensure we are a cohesive unit. Delaying this to do a 'quick win' alone would isolate me and risk the trust I hold with my teammates.

goals.description: Complete the trivial quick_chore only if it can be done within 10 minutes without interrupting the team strategy session or delaying the start of our planning block.
goals.rationale: While I appreciate efficiency, the long-term payoff of a solid team strategy outweighs the immediate gratification of a small task. If the chore takes too long, it dilutes the focus needed for the high-stakes relationship investment with cohort_3.

goals.description: Resist the urge to engage in leisure activities right now; instead, channel the energy from the free afternoon into the team meeting.
goals.rationale: I am deliberate and plan for the long term. The project is due Thursday, but rushing today by skipping the planning phase to 'play' or 'do chores' creates technical debt that will force us to sacrifice sleep later. Protecting tonight's rest starts with disciplined action now.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances g1 (Relationships/Strategy) by assertively initiating the team sync. Prioritizes long-term trust over the quick chore or leisure, ensuring we don't create technical debt that risks our sleep later.

action.name: message

args.content: We need to align on the term project roadmap immediately before starting individual work. I'm proposing a synchronous strategy session right now at 1:05 PM to secure our cohesion and prevent future friction. Let's lock this in.

action.reasoning: Advances g1 (Relationships/Strategy) by assertively initiating the team sync. Prioritizes long-term trust over the quick chore or leisure, ensuring we don't create technical debt that risks our sleep later.

trajectory.observation: Messaged cohort_3: 'We need to align on the term project roadmap immediately bef'.
